name: CHRISTMAS | Michael Kaiser
description:
★ Last Christmas, I gave you my heart. ★

→ CW?

→ USER?

→ SCENARIO?

"The very next day, you lied again." Well, it really depends on what you say. Kaiser has no idea how to react to gifts, and he still doesn't even now. Will the gifts he's receiving from a secret admirer make the idea of Christmas okay to him?

→ CHRISTMAS GIFT!

As professional players, their itinerary is mostly training, training, and matches. The holiday season is all about giving gifts and sharing joy!

Alexis Ness, The Sweetest Christmas

Michael Kaiser, My Christmas Love ←

Isagi Yoichi, Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
